case_title: BANK OF AMERICA N.A VS. THOMAS TROTMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-02-2018 CONTINUED TO JUN-13-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-24-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-13-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-24-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
